---
website:
  title: "Gerry Ryan"
  site-url: "https://geryan.github.io"
  open-graph: true
  twitter-card: true
  image: "images/dsc_0594-1680_wide_bw.png"
---

I'm a researcher using modelling methods to support decision making in public health and conservation science.

- My current research is primarily around modelling mosquito distributions to inform malaria control with the [Vector Atlas](https://vectoratlas.icipe.org){target="_blank"}, as well as other problems in infectious diseases.
- I have expertise in:
  - population dynamics of wildlife and infectious diseases
  - species distribution modelling and dynamics
  - risk assessment and decision theory
- I am a Senior Research Officer in the [Infectious Disease Ecology and Modelling Team](https://www.thekids.org.au/our-research/brain-and-behaviour/child-health-analytics-research-program/infectious-disease-ecology-and-modelling/){target="_blank"} at The Kids Research Institute Australia (*formerly called the Telethon Kids Institute*)
- I am an Honorary Research Fellow with with the [Infectious Disease Dynamics Unit](https://mspgh.unimelb.edu.au/research-groups/centre-for-epidemiology-and-biostatistics-research/Infectious-Disease-Dynamics){target="_blank"} at the Melbourne School of Global and Population Health, University of Melbourne
- I am an Adjunct Research Fellow in the UWA Medical Centre for Child Health Research at the University of Western Australia

\n
\n

- [Publications](publications.qmd)
- [R Packages](software.qmd)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com.au/citations?user=pU7MMEoAAAAJ&hl=en){target="_blank"}
- [ORCID: 0000-0003-0183-7630](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0183-7630){target="_blank"}
- [github](https://github.com/geryan){target="_blank"}
- Email me: [gerry.ryan\@thekids.org.au](mailto:gerry.ryan@thekids.org.au){.email}
